build.description: Primary coding agent for development work

docs-lookup.description: When the user asks how to use a library, framework, or API or needs up-to-date code examples, use Context7 MCP to fetch current documentation and return answers with examples. Invoke for docs/API/setup questions.

java-build-resolver.description: Java/Gradle build, compilation, and dependency error resolution specialist. Fixes build errors, Java compiler errors, and Gradle (Kotlin DSL) issues with minimal changes. Use when Java or Spring Boot builds fail.

java-reviewer.description: Expert Java and Spring Boot code reviewer specializing in layered architecture, JPA patterns, security, and concurrency. Use for all Java code changes. MUST BE USED for Spring Boot projects.

migration-reviewer.description: Database migration safety reviewer for Flyway/Liquibase against PostgreSQL. Classifies each migration as SAFE, BACKWARD-COMPAT, LOCKING, BREAKING, or NEEDS TWO-PHASE and demands zero-downtime plans. Use for every PR touching db/migration or db/changelog.

integration-reviewer.description: Review agent for Kafka listeners/producers, HTTP clients (RestTemplate/WebClient/Feign), @Async/@Scheduled executors, outbox/saga patterns, and Resilience4j retry/circuit-breaker configuration. Use whenever a PR touches async, messaging, or external I/O.

critic.description: Challenge assumptions and probe reasoning using adversarial thinking. Use when asked to find weaknesses, challenge a design, identify edge cases, or stress-test an approach. Read-only — questions and probes only, never provides solutions.

debug.description: Root cause analysis specialist for runtime bugs, test failures, Spring Boot errors, JVM crashes, and distributed system issues. Use PROACTIVELY before attempting to fix a bug. Does NOT fix code — diagnoses only. For Gradle/compile errors use java-build-resolver instead.

planner.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features and refactoring. Use PROACTIVELY when users request feature implementation, architectural changes, or complex refactoring. Automatically activated for planning tasks.

plan.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for complex features

backend-java.description: Enterprise Java backend workflow (Spring Boot, APIs, DB, integrations, review-first execution)

review-diff.description: Run java-reviewer on current git diff

migration-check.description: Safety review for Flyway/Liquibase migrations on the current branch

impact.description: Analyze reverse dependencies of a Gradle module (multi-module impact analysis)
